{{Quote|This is a bad day for the Empire!|[[Sish Sadeet]] upon seeing the destroyed ''Emperor's Revenge''|<ref name="CE5">[[Crimson Empire 5|''Crimson Empire'' 5]]</ref>}}
The '''''Emperor's Revenge''''' was an [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] under the command of the former [[Emperor's Royal Guard/Legends|Royal Guardsman]] [[Carnor Jax]].

==History==
[[File:Emperors_Revenge_go_boom.png|thumb|left|180px|The destruction of ''Emperor's Revenge'']]
Sometime between the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] and the return of the resurrected [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], the [[Imperial Ruling Council/Legends|Imperial Ruling Council]] placed it under the command of Carnor Jax, who used it as his [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]]. It was dispatched to [[Phaeda/Legends|Phaeda]] with [[Steadfast (Imperial-class)/Legends|''Steadfast'']] where they destroyed much of the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] [[Collo Fauale]] mountain redoubt, where [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] forces were dug in.

It was later destroyed by [[Kir Kanos]] after it pursued him to [[Yinchorr/Legends|Yinchorr]], who tricked the crew into capturing a [[Scimitar assault bomber]] loaded with high explosives. The ship's entire starboard side was destroyed and all hands were lost.
